sections: Canonical artifacts, renderer-derived views, and Projections
HCM-0.6 exact shipped kind and root-profile data
HCM-2.1 Project Context canonical-YAML pilot proof gate
First-party intake, renderers, and Projection posture
complete selected dependency and transition record

repo_truth: Fresh read-only Review 3 of the exact eleven-entry HCM-2.1 planning subject after two findings rounds. Review 1 produced six Required findings and Review 2 produced three Required findings; the parent validated and remediated both rounds in planning/control docs only. Independently verify all lineage and exact live feasibility. Review 2 corrections split non-empty-list YAML framing from scalar framing, preserve live reduced-v1-m8 freshness inputs without source length or rendered values, and remove the nonexistent author JSON proof while keeping exact text/outcome/exit/no-delta proof. Inherit no clean conclusion.
allowed_scope: Remain read-only and replay the sorted eleven-entry manifest and aggregate fingerprint before review.
Review every byte of 00, 04, 06, HCM-2.1 SPEC, plan, unchecked todo, all three planning proof files, and immutable Review 1 and Review 2 dispatches.
Read Review 1 cited live engine/compiler/flow/CLI/template/fixture/test sources and unchanged 01, 02, 03, 05, 07, 08, HCM-0.6 decision, selected HCM-1.4 record, and definition assets only as needed.
Run bounded read-only Markdown, link, Git, handoff/schema, source/API feasibility, DTO/byte-contract, cross-platform, compatibility, determinism, security, and proof checks.
Return findings first with exact file/line evidence through the built-in channel.
non_goals: No edits, staging, commits, new dispatches, global handoffs, ledger writes, or user task hops.
No Rust, Cargo, definition, template, fixture, test, runtime/product, pipeline, HCM-2.2+, SDK, Tauri, Substrate, contract, dock, or publication implementation.

Do not invent an alternative remediation, schema field, compatibility mode, serializer, renderer rule, observation model, DTO, budget domain, platform guarantee, Environment Inventory conversion, or pipeline migration.
Do not treat either prior review, either remediation proof, passing old baseline tests, or contingent control-pack wording as evidence that the complete subject is clean.
tasks: Invoke required skills in order, remain read-only, replay the exact eleven-entry manifest/aggregate, and return BLOCKED if any byte differs.
Review findings first in Critical, Required, Optional, Nit order with severity, exact file/line, violated contract/gate, concrete failure, smallest valid remediation, and missing/invalidated proof.
Revalidate both prior findings rounds and their parent remediations against live source; verify every accepted correction is total and reflected across SPEC, plan, todo, 00, 04, 06, and proof.
Check the exact YAML scalar/empty-list versus non-empty-list framing and literal golden for a single unambiguous fingerprint-significant byte contract.

Check the flow DTO, budget, manifest, unchanged reduced-v1-m8 freshness inputs/version/generation, fixture lineage, exact log, compiler JSON/shared/inspect, CLI, and fixed-sibling behavior against live owners and allowed files.
Check non-Unix author text/outcome/category/exit/no-delta proof without an invented JSON interface, plus real doctor JSON/text, flow refusal, cross-compile, and native Windows stop semantics.

Check Environment Inventory reference-only cutover, retained observation/ABA/reason closure, renderer transform, selected-path author/setup/doctor/flow integration, security/race rules, and exact implementation scope for any remaining contradiction.

Verify outcome-neutral status, docs-only current scope, unchecked todo, bridge/classification ceiling, mandatory final review, staged GitNexus detection, primary commit, and separate parent handoff/ledger closeout.
Return CLEAN only if there is no valid Critical or Required finding; otherwise return CHANGES_REQUIRED or BLOCKED. Make no edits and use bounded checks rather than indefinite waits.
stop_conditions: Return BLOCKED if the manifest/aggregate, required authority, live source, or mandatory read-only verification cannot be reproduced.

Return CHANGES_REQUIRED rather than selecting unspecified bytes, DTO behavior, observation semantics, Environment Inventory conversion, unsafe platform fallback, compatibility, pipeline, or later-slice behavior.
Return to the parent if valid remediation would require implementation now, a schema/kind/profile/descriptor change, broader product authority, HCM-2.2+, or global handoff/ledger mutation.
